pr.title: Link multiple files, remove invalid files from configure.py, fix function call
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2593 linked several existing objects in configure.py, removed two invalid NonMatching object entries, adjusted GALE01 symbol metadata for local data/sdata2/sbss ownership, and fixed the WStar spawned callback to call it_80294624 instead of it_80294364. The bot report records linked-code and data progress plus two new matches.

key_files.role: Updated symbol names, scopes, sizes, and local labels for data, sbss, and sdata2 entries, including conversion of several lbl_/jumptable_/ftCo_ symbols to local @NNN-style symbols and resizing unk_804D6480.
Changed plattack.c, plbonus.c, and ftchangeparam.c from NonMatching to Matching, and removed invalid NonMatching entries for melee/ft/ft_3C61.c and melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c.
Reordered two item includes and fixed itWStar_Logic29_Spawned to call it_80294624(gobj) instead of it_80294364(gobj).

what_changed.text: Marked melee/pl/plattack.c, melee/pl/plbonus.c, and melee/ft/ftchangeparam.c as Matching in configure.py.
Removed two NonMatching configure.py entries: melee/ft/ft_3C61.c and melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c.
Changed multiple GALE01 data and sdata2 symbols from global/address-style labels to local compiler-style @NNN symbols, and split lbl_803C6F98 into @642 and @643 entries.
Changed lbl_804D6480 from an 0x8 sbss object to unk_804D6480 as an 0x2 sbss object.
Updated itWStar_Logic29_Spawned to call it_80294624(gobj), replacing it_80294364(gobj).

The decomp bot reported linked code +0.76% (+29480 bytes), matched data +0.01% (+128 bytes), linked data +0.05% (+592 bytes), and two new matches: main/melee/pl/plattack .sbss and main/melee/ft/ftchangeparam .data.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR focused on link/configuration and metadata cleanup rather than broad source rewrites; the only C behavior change in the slice is a narrow function-call correction in itwstar.c.
Removed configure.py entries for paths that the PR title calls invalid, avoiding stale NonMatching object references.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:configure.py removals of melee/ft/ft_3C61.c and melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c

decomp_lessons.text: When promoting objects to Matching in configure.py, corresponding symbol metadata may need synchronized scope, size, and local-label updates so the linked object uses the intended data ownership.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report showing new matches and data/link progress

decomp_lessons.text: Configuration cleanup can include deleting invalid object entries rather than merely changing their matching status.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:configure.py removals of melee/ft/ft_3C61.c and melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c

naming_conventions.text: This PR uses local compiler-style @NNN names with scope:local for several data, sdata2, and jumptable-like entries that were previously lbl_ or jumptable_ names.
This PR uses unk_804D6480 for an unknown sbss object after reducing its recorded size to 0x2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:config/GALE01/symbols.txt hunk changing lbl_804D6480 to unk_804D6480

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Promoted specific object files from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py after symbol metadata adjustments; the bot report supports link/match progress but does not include local build or objdiff details.
Adjusted symbol scopes and sizes in symbols.txt rather than adding C dummy storage in the shown source diff.
Corrected a likely call target in item WStar initialization/spawn logic by replacing it_80294364 with it_80294624.

follow_up_queries: PR 2593 configure.py plattack plbonus ftchangeparam Matching
remove invalid configure.py Object NonMatching ft_3C61 ftPp_SpecialS

evidence_refs: metadata_json for PR identity, changed files, merge state, and counts
raw_diff full diff for all file changes
text_corpus.jsonl for empty PR body and bot report
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The bot report provides aggregate progress and two new matches, but no objdiff, build command, or adjacent-regression details are present.
Symbol metadata changes are visible, but the slice does not explain why each individual local name, size, or scope is correct.
The title says invalid files were removed from configure.py; the diff shows removals, but the slice does not include separate path-existence or build-error evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Synchronize configure.py Matching promotions with symbol metadata
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2593 promoted plattack.c, plbonus.c, and ftchangeparam.c to Matching while also changing GALE01 symbol metadata; the bot reported linked-code/data progress and two new matches. Candidate lesson: when linking/matching an object, inspect whether symbols.txt scope/size/local-label metadata also needs correction.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Delete invalid configure object entries instead of carrying stale NonMatching paths
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2593 removed NonMatching entries for melee/ft/ft_3C61.c and melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c from configure.py under a title that explicitly mentions removing invalid files.

source_update_candidates.title: configure.py removed invalid object entries in PR 2593
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2593 removed Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ft_3C61.c") and Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/chara/ftPp_SpecialS.c") from configure.py. The PR title describes this as removing invalid files.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path/configuration fact for curator review; not independently verified beyond PR evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: itwstar spawned logic call target changed in PR 2593
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/it/items/itwstar.c, itWStar_Logic29_Spawned now calls it_80294624(gobj) instead of it_80294364(gobj).
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible symbol/callsite fact for curator review; slice does not include semantic explanation of the two callees.

source_update_candidates.title: Selected configure.py objects marked Matching in PR 2593
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2593 changed configure.py entries for melee/pl/plattack.c, melee/pl/plbonus.c, and melee/ft/ftchangeparam.c from NonMatching to Matching.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential historical matching-status fact; curator should confirm current status before treating it as durable source truth.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every symbols.txt rename in this PR is a general naming standard; the slice only proves these specific metadata edits.
Do not claim objdiff success or full regression coverage; only the decomp-dev bot aggregate report is loaded.
Do not infer reviewer intent or requested changes; no human review comments are present.
